security_gap.gap_description: Vote input may be spoofed without signature verification.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system accepts unsigned votes from external actors.

assumptions: The governance contract does not enforce signature verification for vote messages.
The actor is able to access the voting interface without authentication.

mitigation.strategy: Require signature-based vote authentication and role validation.

description: An attacker may impersonate a user and submit fraudulent votes to the governance contract.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be modified without detection.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not validate the integrity of vote messages.

assumptions: The governance contract does not validate vote data integrity.
The actor can intercept and modify vote messages before reaching the contract.

mitigation.strategy: Implement data integrity checks for vote messages.

description: An attacker may modify vote data to alter the outcome of the voting process.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system does not provide mechanisms to verify the origin of votes.

assumptions: The governance contract does not track the identity of voters.
The actor can cast votes anonymously.

mitigation.strategy: Implement a system to authenticate voters and record their identity with votes.

description: An attacker may cast votes and deny their involvement.

security_gap.gap_description: Vote data may be exposed to unauthorized actors.

actor_risk.description: The actor is unauthenticated and can perform governance actions.

behavioral_risk.rationale: The system may not protect vote data from unauthorized access.

assumptions: The governance contract does not properly protect vote data.
The actor can access the database or network traffic containing vote data.

mitigation.strategy: Implement access controls to protect vote data.

description: An attacker may gain access to vote data.
